productDisplayName: Nike Men Basecamp Black Sports Shoes
description: With the nike Basecamp shoe you can trek with comfort and style. Gearing up for any sport requires a demanding regimen. The nike Basecamp trekking shoe goes beyond a regular shoe with a low-profile, flexible design built with distance-ready cushioning. Including a modern, streamlined look, this shoe is a serious blend of style and comfort. The Nike Basecamp wraps the foot in soft comfort with an innersleeve, while a mesh upper circulates air with every step to keep the foot cool on hot days. A full-length Phylon midsole teams up with a Max Air unit in the heel for superb impact protection that helps extend every training session. A waffle pattern at the outsole enhances cushioning on any surface and provides long-lasting durability. Upper Mesh upper for enhanced breathability with suede overlays for foot support Padded textile collar and tongue Lace-up system for customised snug Fit Haul loop and heel cup at back heel Nike ACG branding Midsole Max Air technology for maximum impact protection and cushioning Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort Outsole Deep flex grooves for a smoother, more efficient stride Solid rubber outsole for durability with grooves and lugs for great grip on all terrains Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
